## Task Files

Each task is documented individually in `docs/tasks/`:

```
docs/tasks/
├── TASK-001.md
├── TASK-002.md
└── TASK-003.md
```

Refer to individual task files for full implementation details, subtasks, and notes.

---

## Completion Criteria

This task list is complete when:

- [ ] All tasks are in Done status
- [ ] All story acceptance criteria have been verified
- [ ] All code reviews are approved
- [ ] All tests are passing
- [ ] Documentation is updated
